channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Media urged to avoid describing white South African emigrants as refugees
item.description: The opinion article argues that media outlets should stop using the term ‘refugees’ to describe white South Africans who emigrate, particularly those relocating to countries such as the United States....

item.title: Report Raises Concerns Over Religious Leader Accused of Breaking Four Public Commitments
item.description: A recent report published by Tanzania Insight has sparked public discussion after allegations emerged that a religious leader identified as “Idd” failed to fulfil four important commitments or promise...

item.title: Infrastructure upgrades increase eco-tourism and conservation efforts at Pugu-Kazimzumbwi Forest Reserve
item.description: Tanzania Forest Services Agency (TFS) amesema kuwa uwekezaji wa miundombinu ndani ya Hifadhi ya Msitu wa Asili ya Pugu-Kazimzumbwi umeongeza kwa kiasi kikubwa shughuli za eco-tourism kati ya mwaka 202...

item.title: Top Facial Sunscreens in the UK for 2026: Lightweight and Effective Options for All Skin Types
item.description: Sun protection is essential year-round, especially for those using serums with vitamin C or retinol, which increase the skin's sensitivity to UV damage. The article reviews a selection of facial sunsc...

item.title: Inside Melbourne’s illegal gambling underworld and the legacy of Charlie Wootton
item.description: The article explores the life and legacy of Charlie Wootton, a central figure in Melbourne’s illegal gambling scene, through the reflections of his son, Robert Wootton. Charlie, often described as an ...

item.title: Witness unable to verify exact timing of cellphone seizure in Durban corruption trial
item.description: Testimony in the Durban High Court has raised questions around the handling and documentation of evidence in the ongoing Durban Solid Waste corruption trial involving former eThekwini city manager Sip...

item.title: DA rejects eThekwini municipality’s revised tariff proposals for 2026/27 financial year
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) in the eThekwini municipality has expressed strong opposition to the city’s revised tariff proposals for the 2026/27 financial year, despite the mayor presenting the chang...

item.title: Tanzania GDP growth outlook, inflation trends, and key sector budgets for 2025–2027
item.description: According to the African Development Bank (AfDB) African Economic Outlook 2026, Tanzania’s economy continued to show strong performance in 2025, recording a GDP growth rate of 6.0%, up from 5.5% in 20...

item.title: Alberta government finalizes wording of October 19 referendum question on potential separation process
item.description: The Government of Alberta has officially confirmed the wording of the referendum question to be presented to voters on October 19, focusing on the province’s constitutional future and potential separa...

item.title: Senator Susan Collins Faces Criticism for Comments on Iraq War and Military Service
item.description: Senator Susan Collins (R-ME) came under intense criticism for her recent remarks regarding Democratic opponent Graham Platner's military service. During a campaign stop, Collins emphasized that Platne...

item.title: Police arrest five and detain eleven after attack on ED vehicles following raids at former Kerala CM Vijayan’s residence
item.description: Police in Kerala have arrested five individuals and detained 11 others in connection with an attack on vehicles used by Enforcement Directorate (ED) officials following raids at the residence of forme...

item.title: Former US Defence Secretary urges Australia and regional allies to clarify stance on Taiwan defence
item.description: Mark Esper, former US Secretary of Defence under Donald Trump, has stated that the US expects Australia to support it in the event of a Chinese attack on Taiwan. In an interview at the GLOBSEC forum i...

item.title: Supreme Court overturns CCI order against Amazon-Future deal, emphasises fair regulatory approach
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has overturned a Competition Commission of India (CCI) order that had revoked Amazon’s acquisition of a 49% stake in Future Coupons in 2019 and imposed a ₹202 crore penalty ...

item.title: Tropical Storm Domeng enters PAR, expected to strengthen into typhoon while staying offshore
item.description: Tropical Storm Domeng entered the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) early Friday morning, May 29, according to PAGASA, although it is expected to remain far from the country and is unlikely to m...

item.title: NASA Details Early Missions and Phased Deployment Plan for Its Lunar Base Program
item.description: NASA has updated its lunar base deployment strategy just two months after unveiling its initial concept, refining how it will combine crewed Artemis missions with commercially driven CLPS lunar delive...

item.title: Kaduna Government Highlights Three Years of Reforms in Healthcare, Agriculture, Infrastructure and Security Under Uba Sani
item.description: The article reviews the performance of the Kaduna State Government under Governor Uba Sani after three years in office, highlighting major reforms and development projects across different sectors. Ac...

item.title: Toronto girl found safe as Canada weighs Swedish early warning aircraft purchase and other national news updates
item.description: Canadian authorities confirmed that a 14-year-old girl from Toronto who had been reported missing for nearly two weeks has been found safe. Police located the teenager, identified as Esther, in a resi...

item.title: Elmer Catulpos replaces resigning members as 1 Tahanan Party-List representative
item.description: Elmer Catulpos, a media executive and businessman, has officially taken office as the representative of 1 Tahanan Party-List, following the resignation of former representative Nathaniel Oducado. Oduc...

item.title: ASX set to rise as US inflation slows and Iran ceasefire extended
item.description: Australian shares are expected to advance after Wall Street reached new highs, thanks to strong results from Snowflake and a tentative 60-day extension of the US–Iran ceasefire, which helped ease conc...

item.title: Nine finalists compete in the 2026 Scripps National Spelling Bee finals in Washington, D.C.
item.description: The 2026 Scripps National Spelling Bee reached its final stage on Thursday night in Washington, D.C., where nine students competed for the championship title. The finals were held at DAR Constitution ...
